title: Read-only audit in /Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public. Determine whether kernel-task-completion-backup / GHA recording is usable from Claude/FUGUE flows, not just Codex. Focus on workflow, local runner scripts, and any docs or workflows that invoke task completion backup from Claude/FUGUE...
summary_text: **Findings** 1. High: completion provenance is hard-pinned to Codex in wrapper scripts, so Claude-executed work is mis-attributed. - [kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh:115) - [kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:145) - [kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh:194) 2. High: FUGUE mainframe workflows don’t currently call the completion-backup wrappers; they run Codex implement directly, so backup usage from Claude/FUGUE is not automatic today. - [fugue-tutti-caller.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-tutti-caller.yml:787) - [fugue-codex-implement.yml](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/.github/workflows/fugue-codex-implement.yml:614) - [workflow-ownership.md](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/docs/agents/workflow-ownership.md:17) 3. Medium: tests validate source/no-gha behavior, but not provider-aware assistant propagation in wrapper paths. - [test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh:75) - [test-kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh:35) - [test-kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh:137) **Preferred approach (minimal + robust)** - Keep `scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh` as the single recorder/dispatcher. - In both wrapper scripts, replace hardcoded `--assistant codex` with resolved assistant using precedence: 1. `KERNEL_COMPLETION_ASSISTANT` 2. `KERNEL_EXECUTION_PROVIDER` 3. `FUGUE_EXECUTION_PROVIDER` 4. fallback `codex` - Normalize/allowlist assistant values to avoid audit fragmentation. - Preserve existing `--source` values (`kernel-run-complete`, `kernel-phase-complete`, `kernel-progress-save`) so compliance mapping stays stable. - Do not change default `--no-gha` policy in this pass; keep current risk posture and let FUGUE/Claude paths opt in via existing `KERNEL_ALLOW_GHA_NONCRITICAL=true` where needed. **Exact files/tests to touch** - Scripts: - [scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-run-complete.sh) - [scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/lib/kernel-milestone-record.sh) - [scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/scripts/local/run-kernel-task-completion-backup.sh) (only if you add assistant normalization/default helper) - Tests: - [tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-run-complete.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-milestone-record.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-phase-gate.sh) - [tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh](/Users/masayuki/Dev/fugue-orchestrator-public/tests/test-kernel-task-completion-backup-fallback.sh) (add Claude fallback assertion) **Risks** - If assistant normalization is too strict, future providers may be dropped to fallback unexpectedly. - If you switch to `main` provider instead of `execution` provider, Hybrid attribution becomes wrong. - If non-critical GHA dispatch is enabled broadly, backup branch write volume increases. - Until FUGUE workflows explicitly invoke wrapper completion hooks, this remains a local/kernel-path improvement, not full end-to-end Claude/FUGUE automation.
